summary: Iteration 8: Trade System Phase 1 testing complete. Backend: 17/17 trade API tests passed. Frontend: All trade UI features verified - Trades page with Active/History tabs, trade detail modal with Accept/Counter/Decline buttons, Propose Trade modal from Market tab, Profile Trades tab with real trade data, and Navbar updates (Add link removed, My Trades in dropdown).

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test trades between demo and trader users during backend testing. Test listings created for various trade scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade System Phase 1 fully tested. Two test users: demo (148 records, owns TRADE listings) and trader (1 record: Rumours). Trade state machine: PROPOSED → COUNTERED → ACCEPTED/DECLINED. Accept changes listing to IN_TRADE. Counter allows requesting different record or changing boot. Profile /api/users/{username}/trades returns only ACCEPTED/COMPLETED/SHIPPING/CONFIRMING trades. Boot is display-only (settled directly between traders).

endpoints: POST /api/trades - propose trade with listing_id, offered_record_id, optional boot and message
GET /api/trades - get user's trades (as initiator or responder)
GET /api/trades/{id} - get trade detail with populated data
PUT /api/trades/{id}/counter - counter with different record or boot
validations: Cannot have duplicate pending trade on same listing
Only responder can accept PROPOSED, only initiator can accept COUNTERED
Accepts changes listing status to IN_TRADE

components: TradeCard showing both records, status, boot, messages count
ProposeTradeModal from Market tab TRADE listings
Profile Trades tab with real trade data

changes: 'My Trades' menu item added to user dropdown
